recalls.Description: The recall affects two styles of TheKiddoSpace handwriting practice kits that may pose a lead exposure risk. The block handwriting kits feature four reusable books adorned with animal illustrations, alongside black pens and colorful pen grips. The cursive handwriting kits include three reusable books focused on letters, words, and sentences, complete with similar writing tools. Both kits are marked with the TheKiddoSpace logo and respective titles on their covers and boxes.
recalls.Title: TheKiddoSpace Recalls Children's Handwriting Kits Due to Lead Exposure Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact TheKiddoSpace via email at info@thekiddospace.com, or visit www.thekiddospacestore.com/pages/product-recalls/handwriting-kit. Alternatively, navigate to www.thekiddospacestore.com and select 'Product Safety Recalls' at the bottom for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled TheKiddoSpace Block Handwriting Practice Kit
Recalled TheKiddoSpace Cursive Handwriting Practice Kit

Retailers.Name: Available online at TheKiddoSpaceStore.com and Amazon.com from February 2024 to February 2025, priced between $25 and $50.

Importers.Name: SN Commerce LLC, dba TheKiddoSpaceStore, of Dover, Delaware

Hazards.Name: Lead exposure from pens exceeding federal safety limits, posing health risks to children.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the kits immediately, keep pens away from children, and contact TheKiddoSpace for free replacements. Dispose of the old pens as per local regulations and send a disposal photo to info@thekiddospace.com.

recalls.metaDescription: TheKiddoSpace recalls handwriting kits due to lead exposure risk. Learn how to get free replacements and ensure your child's safety.

recalls.Description: TheKiddoSpace is recalling its children's story books due to a choking hazard. These soft fabric books are approximately 7 inches by 8 inches and feature six felt pages. The front cover displays the TheKiddoSpace logo along with the words "BOOK," "2," and illustrations of a rainbow and clouds. The packaging also includes the TheKiddoSpace logo and the title "Boys and Girls Sensory Storybook."
recalls.Title: TheKiddoSpace Recalls Children's Story Books Over Choking Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach TheKiddoSpace via email at info@thekiddospace.com, or visit their website at thekiddospacestore.com/pages/product-recalls/story-book. Alternatively, go to www.thekiddospacestore.com and click on "Product Safety Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled TheKiddoSpace Sensory Story Book with packaging

Retailers.Name: Available online at Thekiddospacestore.com from March 2023 through February 2025, priced between $45 and $50.

Importers.Name: SN Commerce LLC, dba TheKiddoSpaceStore, of Dover, Delaware

Hazards.Name: Detachable felt parts posing a choking hazard

Remedies.Name: Immediately stop using the recalled books, keep them away from children, and contact TheKiddoSpace for a full refund. Consumers must write "RECALLED" in permanent marker on the book and send a photo of it in the trash to info@thekiddospace.com.

recalls.metaDescription: TheKiddoSpace recalls children's story books due to a choking hazard. Learn how to get a refund and ensure safety.
